definition.en: Psychological time is a natural connective to the inner world.
definition.zh: 心理时间是通往内在世界的自然连接物。

definition.en: Psychological time is the lowest common denominator, so to speak, from your viewpoint. That is, many of the barriers disappear. Psychological time represents on your plane the closest you can come to the experience of timelessness as far as your physical laws are concerned.
definition.zh: 从你们的观点来看，心理时间可以说是最小的公分母。也就是说，许多障碍都消失了。就你们的物理法则而言，心理时间在你们的层面上代表了你们所能达到的最接近无时间体验的状态。

definition.en: Psychological time is a sort of climate or environment conducive to the existence of all consciousness.
definition.zh: 心理时间是一种有利于所有意识存在的氛围或环境。

definition.en: The use of psychological time is a basic necessity for any experiment. Such use of psychological time is extremely important, since it enables the personality to bypass physical laws to a large extent; and also, and this is important, bypass certain chemical reactions that would ordinarily occur, and tend to overtax the physical structure.
definition.zh: 心理时间的运用是任何实验的基本必要条件。这种对心理时间的运用极其重要，因为它使人格能够在很大程度上绕过物理法则；而且，这一点很重要，还能绕过通常会发生并倾向于过度消耗身体结构的某些化学反应。

definition.en: The groupings of inner senses most dependent upon the use of psychological time are those which involve a nearly complete disentanglement from camouflage pattern, without taking on other patterns, and these are perhaps the most important because they come closer to the direct experience of unveiled reality.
definition.zh: 最依赖心理时间运用的内在感官群组，是那些涉及几乎完全摆脱伪装模式而不采用其他模式的群组，这些也许是最重要的，因为它们更接近于对未经掩盖的现实的直接体验。

explanation:
心理时间是连接内在世界与外在世界的自然通道。它并非钟表所测量的物理时间，而是一种主观的、内在的持续感。当你进入心理时间，钟表时间的边界会消融，你可以在清醒状态下体验到深度休息与恢复，甚至减少睡眠需求。心理时间是你这个层面上最接近“无时间性”的体验——它让许多屏障消失，使内在形式得以透过伪装显现。

心理时间在梦境中运作：你可能在梦中经历数小时或数天，但身体并未因此衰老。这是因为心理时间独立于物理时间伪装，不受其化学反应的制约。通过充分运用心理时间，你可以绕过物理定律，减少伪装，直接体验内在现实。它不仅是探索内在自我的唯一媒介，还能让你从心理时间的框架回看钟表时间，发现后者同样如梦似幻，

quotes.text: This is going to be a rather brief session comparatively. One note I wanted to make: As I have said, psychological time is a natural connective to the inner world. Though you experience days or hours within the framework of psychological time during the dream state, and yet do not age for a comparable amount of physical time, so as you develop in your use of psychological time you will be able to rest and be refreshed within the framework of psychological time while you are consciously awake. This will aid your mental and physical state to an amazing degree, and you will discover added vitality on the one hand, and a somewhat decreased need to sleep on the other.
quotes.translation: 这相对来说将是一次相当简短的课。我想提一点：正如我说过的，心理时间是通往内在世界的自然连接。虽然在梦境状态中，你在心理时间的框架内经历了数天或数小时，却不会因相应的物理时间而衰老，因此当你逐渐发展出对心理时间的运用能力时，你就能在有意识清醒的状态下，在心理时间的框架内休息并恢复精力。这将极大地改善你的心智与身体状态，你会发现一方面精力更加充沛，另一方面睡眠需求有所减少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Incidentally again, hypnosis also helps you to use psychological time to a true advantage. The boundaries of clock time melt when psychological time is utilized. You can look through psychological time at clock time, and even use clock time to your advantage; but without the initial recognition of psychological time, then clock time is somewhat of a prison.
quotes.translation: 顺便再提一点，催眠也能帮助你真正有效地利用心理时间。当心理时间被运用时，钟表时间的界限便会消融。你可以透过心理时间审视钟表时间，甚至善用钟表时间；但若没有最初对心理时间的认知，那么钟表时间在某种程度上便是一座牢笼。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now basically, consciousness itself is a type of barrier, and anything that has consciousness experiences time to some degree. This degree may be so slight that to you it would not seem to exist at all. Self-consciousness presents a larger barrier, therefore the sense of time is greater. Psychological time is the lowest common denominator, so to speak, from your viewpoint. That is, many of the barriers disappear. Psychological time represents on your plane the closest you can come to the experience of timelessness as far as your physical laws are concerned.
quotes.translation: 现在，从根本上说，意识本身是一种屏障，任何拥有意识的事物都会在某种程度上体验时间。这种程度可能极其微弱，以至于对你而言它似乎根本不存在。自我意识构成了更大的屏障，因此时间感也更强烈。从你的视角来看，心理时间可以说是最低的共同分母。也就是说，许多屏障都消失了。就你的物理法则而言，心理时间代表了你在这个层面上所能最接近无时间体验的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is why psychological time seems to flow so easily when physical time is pursued and watched by a quiet "I". The one leads to the other and the camouflage is loose enough to let the inner form shine through. A proper use of psychological time will not only lead you into the inner world, but will also prevent you from being rushed in the physical world. Within it, that is within the framework of psychological time, you will discover a quiet and cool peacefulness. I tell you both this for your benefit, because both of you will gain much in the utilization of these added benefits.
quotes.translation: 这就是为什么当物理时间被一个安静的“我”所追寻和观察时，心理时间似乎如此顺畅地流动。一个导向另一个，伪装变得足够松散，让内在形式得以闪耀。正确运用心理时间不仅会引导你进入内在世界，还会防止你在物质世界中感到匆忙。在其中，即在心理时间的框架内，你会发现一种宁静而清凉的平和。我告诉你们俩这些是为了你们的好处，因为你们俩都会在利用这些额外益处中获得很多收获。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The laws of evolution were self-limiting laws in one respect, but involve a necessary discipline in formation. The fact that entities always existed and always will exist sounds strange or even impossible simply because of your present perspective. Even your small studies with psychological time should give you some valuable insight into this matter, however, and the use of psychological time is very important because of the avenues which it will open for you.
quotes.translation: 进化法则在某种程度上是自我限制的法则，但涉及形成过程中的必要训练。实体始终存在并将永远存在这一事实，听起来奇怪甚至不可能，仅仅是因为你当前的视角。然而，即使你对心理时间的小小研究，也应该让你对此事有宝贵的洞察，而心理时间的运用非常重要，因为它将为你开辟道路。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Even for example, levitation is involved with camouflage to a large degree, in that the camouflage physical body itself rises, but we are still here using the camouflage physical form. Traveling without the camouflage physical form is a giant step, of course, but a possible one according to your development. Here you are traveling however through camouflage space. It is very difficult on your level to do without any camouflage, and yet it can be done; and here again the use of psychological time is extremely important, since when psychological time is utilized to its fullest extent, then camouflage becomes lessened to an almost astounding degree.
quotes.translation: 例如，即使悬浮也在很大程度上涉及伪装，因为伪装的物质身体本身会升起，但我们仍然在这里使用伪装的物质形态。当然，在没有伪装物质形态的情况下旅行是一个巨大的飞跃，但根据你的发展，这是可能的。然而，在这里你是在穿越伪装空间。在你的层面上，完全没有任何伪装是非常困难的，但却是可以做到的；而在这里，心理时间的运用再次变得极其重要，因为当心理时间被最大程度地运用时，伪装就会减弱到几乎令人惊叹的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Outer physical time is a complete camouflage, unnecessary basically on your plane; but you have made it seem necessary because of your refusal to admit the inner self as part of your whole personality, and therefore you have not been able to utilize psychological time to its fullest advantage on your plane. Psychological time as I have said is a natural pathway, part of an inner sense, that was meant as an easy access from the inner to the outer world and back again. You do not use it as such.
quotes.translation: 外在物理时间是彻底的伪装，在你们层面基本上毫无必要；但你们却让它显得不可或缺，只因你们拒绝承认内在自己是完整人格的一部分，因此无法在你们层面充分发挥心理时间的优势。如我所言，心理时间是天然通道，属于内在感官的一部分，本应成为连接内在世界与外在世界的便捷桥梁，往返自如。你们并未如此运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Any such communications coming through the inner senses will exist in your psychological time. I have said also that this psychological time operates during sleep and during quiet times of consciousness. Now in dreams and in the dream framework you have the feeling of experiencing many hours, or even days. These days or hours that you seem to experience in dreams are not recorded by the physical body, and are outside of your physical time camouflage. If in a dream for example you experience within the framework two days, physically you do not age for these two days.
quotes.translation: 任何经由内在感官传递的信息都将存在于你们的心理时间中。我也曾说过，这种心理时间在睡眠时和意识宁静时刻运作。在梦境与梦的架构中，你们会有经历数小时甚至数日的感觉。这些在梦中体验到的时日，肉体并无记录，且超脱于物理时间伪装之外。例如若在梦境架构中经历两日，肉体并不会因此衰老两日。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Most realities have absolutely nothing to do with space as you imagine it. Most realities have their growth and existence in something closely akin to what we have called psychological time, and this is completely independent of space as you conceive it to be. Psychological time is a sort of climate or environment conducive to the existence of all consciousness.
quotes.translation: 绝大多数实相与你们所想象的空间毫无关联。它们的成长与存续存在于某种与我们称为心理时间极为相似的介质中，这完全独立于你们所认知的空间概念。心理时间是一种气候或环境，滋养着所有意识的存续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I am extremely sorry that Ruburt feels so badly, and I will do what I can to help. My dear friends, I wish you a fond good evening; and may I mention briefly that you were right, Joseph; your last experience with psychological time was most significant. And Ruburt had also tuned in on the same conversation, but had already begun to tense, and therefore was blocking every psychological stimulus in the hopes of blocking out the right one. Unfortunately, he blocked out all of this except the right one.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏如此不适我深感遗憾，定当尽力相助。亲爱的朋友们，祝你们晚安；容我简短提及：约瑟夫，你上次对心理时间的体验极具意义。鲁柏也曾接收到同一对话，但当时已开始紧张，于是试图屏蔽所有心理刺激以阻挡正确信息。不幸的是，他除了正确信息外屏蔽了一切。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I am sure you see the many places that this can lead us. For one thing, psychological time is so much a part of inner reality that even though your inner self is still connected to the physical body, you are in the dream framework free of some very important physical effects. Now as your dreams seem to involve you in duration that is independent of your clock time, and I have much more to say here, so can you achieve the actual experience of duration as far as your inner visions are concerned.
quotes.translation: 相信你们已看到这能引领我们走向诸多方向。其一，心理时间与内在实相紧密相连，即便内在自己仍与肉体相连，在梦境架构中你们已摆脱某些重要物理效应的影响。正如梦境让你们经历独立于钟表时间的持续感——此处我尚有更多要阐述——你们同样能在内在视像中体验真实的持续感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The use of psychological time is a basic necessity for any experiment. Such use of psychological time is extremely important, since it enables the personality to bypass physical laws to a large extent; and also, and this is important, bypass certain chemical reactions that would ordinarily occur, and tend to overtax the physical structure.
quotes.translation: 运用心理时间是任何实验的基本需求。这种心理时间的运用至关重要，因为它能使人格大幅绕过物理法则；同时——这点很重要——还能绕过某些通常会发生、且易使肉体结构超负荷的化学反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Psychological time adds duration. You will find something else here. From the framework of psychological time you will see that clock time is as dreamlike and fleeting as you once thought inner time was. And you will discover that inner time is as much a reality as you once thought outer time was. You will discover your whole selves in other worlds, peeping inward and outward at the same time, and finding that all time is one time, and that all divisions are illusion.
quotes.translation: 心理时间增加了持续性。你在这里会发现别的东西。从心理时间的架构中，你会看到钟表时间和你曾经以为内在时间一样如梦似幻、转瞬即逝。而你会发现内在时间和曾经以为外在时间一样真实。你会在其他世界发现你的全部自我，同时向内向外窥视，发现所有时间都是同一个时间，所有划分都是幻相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The grouping of inner senses with which we are now concerned deal with the disentanglement of one set of camouflage patterns and the taking up of another set. The groupings of inner senses most dependent upon the use of psychological time are those which involve a nearly complete disentanglement from camouflage pattern, without taking on other patterns, and these are perhaps the most important because they come closer to the direct experience of unveiled reality.
quotes.translation: 我们现在关注的内在感官分组，处理的是摆脱一套伪装模式并接受另一套模式。最依赖心理时间使用的内在感官分组，涉及几乎完全摆脱伪装模式而不接受其他模式，这些或许是最重要的，因为它们更接近未经掩盖的现实的直接体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Psychological time is indeed the only medium, or framework, within which exploration of the inner self can be carried on. Again, you should both find yourselves coming within a sphere of activity in your experiments, with the coming of autumn. For reasons that I will discuss later, the shift of seasons always gives rise to added bursts of psychic energy, though indeed the added bursts of psychic energy are in main responsible for the shift of seasons.
quotes.translation: 心理时间确实是唯一可以进行内在自我探索的媒介或架构。再次，随着秋天的到来，你们俩都应该发现自己在实验中进入了一个活动领域。出于我稍后会讨论的原因，季节的转换总是会引发额外的灵性能量爆发，尽管实际上这些额外的灵性能量爆发才是季节转换的主要原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I am going to suggest also that Ruburt continue with the procedure as far as psychological time is concerned, that is, that he lets it go until I tell him otherwise. The experience, the subjective experience, of the last session, on Ruburt's part, was meant as a practical demonstration of the limitless self. I am very pleased that we did so well with it, and various other such controlled experiments can be expected in the future.
quotes.translation: 我也建议鲁柏在心理时间方面继续这个程序，也就是说，让他顺其自然，直到我另有指示。上次课程中鲁柏的体验，主观体验，本意是对无限自我的实际示范。我很高兴我们在这方面做得这么好，未来可以期待各种其他类似的控制实验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your physical time of seasons and tides, and night and day, is to me one of your most delightful camouflages, and if Ruburt will excuse my clumsy attempt at being poetical, I will say that physical time is like a delightful flowing gown that clothes psychological time with many different colors and materials and designs. It is a most faithful reproduction of psychological time, and one of your truest camouflages.
quotes.translation: 你们物理时间的季节、潮汐、昼夜，在我看来是你们最令人愉悦的伪装之一。如果鲁柏能原谅我笨拙地尝试诗意表达，我会说物理时间就像一件流动的华美长袍，用许多不同的颜色、材质和图案来装点心理时间。它是对心理时间最忠实的再现，也是你们最真实的伪装之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: If you use psychological time as I have told you, you will get immediate firsthand experience of many facets of reality which take me pages to explain with the indirect use of words. All entities basically are self-aware portions of energy or vitality. They are self-generating and there is no possibility of thinking in terms of either beginning or end. Again, it is only your own camouflage- imprisoned data which makes you think that everything has a beginning and an end.
quotes.translation: 如果你按照我告诉你的方式使用心理时间，你会立即获得许多现实层面的直接第一手体验，而这些我需要用间接的文字花上好几页来解释。所有存有本质上都是能量或活力的自我觉知部分。它们是自我生成的，不可能以开始或结束来思考。再次强调，只有你们自己被伪装囚禁的数据，才让你们认为一切都有开始和结束。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is closely related to one of the inner senses, the second inner sense, and it is upon psychological time that you must try to transpose your inner visions. You can see how handicapped we both are because of the difficulties involved in trying to make you understand inner data in terms of outer data, when the two are so apart, really, even while they are so closely connected. For instance, when I tell you that the second sense is like your sense of time, while this does give you a certain understanding or feeling of what this second sense is like, nevertheless it also is confusing, I know, because you are apt to compare the two too closely.
quotes.translation: 这与内在感官之一，即第二内在感官密切相关，你必须尝试借助心理时间转译你的内在视像。你能看出我们双方都受到怎样的限制——因为要让你以外在数据理解内在数据实在困难重重，这两者虽紧密相连，实则天差地别。例如，当我告诉你第二感官就像你的时间感时，这虽能让你对第二感官有某种理解或感受，但我知道这也会造成混淆，因为你容易将两者过度类比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I do not mean, of course, that he will automatically turn into a jellyfish when a good fight may be called for. The use of psychological time, to some large degree, also performs this function. If he had set out, and he didn't, to plan a process that would enable him to use his abilities to the fullest in his writing and other fields in which he is interested, and yet to discipline himself so that he did not scatter his abilities, if he had set out on a plan toward maturity, and to set definite controls upon his sometimes too fast, out-of-proportion responses, he could not have found a better path than the one which he is now following.
quotes.translation: 当然，我并非意指他在需要奋起抗争时会自动变成水母。心理时间的运用在很大程度上也发挥着这种功能。即便他从未刻意规划——事实上他也没有——要设计一套流程，让他在写作及其他感兴趣的领域充分发挥才能，同时自律以避免分散能力；即便他从未制定走向成熟的计划，也未对有时过快、失当的反应设定明确控制——他也不可能找到比现在所走之路更佳的途径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: That is, you will achieve the counterpart of sight, sound, smell, touch, embellished by inner counterparts of width and existence. You have trouble now with the duration of your inner visions because you are trying to transpose them according to physical camouflage time, and this is going about it in the wrong way to begin with. As I mentioned earlier in the last session, you have at your command even now an inroad so to speak, and a relatively accessible one, in what is termed psychological time.
quotes.translation: 也就是说，你将获得视觉、听觉、嗅觉、触觉的对应物，并辅以宽度与存在的内在对应物。你现在之所以难以把握内在视像的持续时长，是因为你试图根据物质伪装时间来转译它们，这从一开始就选错了方向。正如我在上次课程中提到的，即便现在，你也拥有一个可称之为突破口且相对易于触及的途径，那就是所谓的心理时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You do experience time, but not time as it is bound by your camouflage patterns. As I have mentioned you can in a dream or daydream or through conscious use of psychological time experience many hours in a few clock minutes. This experience comes very close to the third inner sense. If you will remember again our imaginary experience through the inner senses as we looked down at the street, you will remember that I spoke of sensing not only the present essence of the living consciousness within a certain scope, but I also mentioned sensing their past and futures.
quotes.translation: 你确实体验着时间，但并非受限于伪装模式的时间。如我所言，你可以在梦境、白日梦或有意识地运用心理时间时，在几分钟的时钟时间内体验数小时。这种体验非常接近第三内在感官。若你回想我们通过内在感官俯视街道的假想体验，便会记得我曾提及，我不仅感知到特定范围内活意识的当下本质，还感知到它们的过去与未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In a very simple example, consider that you yourself use your own energy to create your dream world. In this way also you create your so-called real camouflage world, the only difference being that the dream world images do not have duration in physical time although they have duration in psychological time. And believe it or not, actually your individuality has much more freedom in the creation of your dream world, and this is the reason why the dream world does not appear consistent to others.
quotes.translation: 举个简单例子：想想你如何用自己的能量创造梦境世界。同样地，你也创造了所谓的真实伪装世界，唯一区别在于梦境世界的影像在物理时间中没有持续时长，尽管它们在心理时间中具有持续性。信不信由你，实际上你的个体性在创造梦境世界时拥有更多自由，这正是梦境世界在他人看来不具一致性的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I hope that you will develop along these lines, but the rate of progress is of course up to you, and your individual abilities will vary as to particulars. This is to be expected. As a rule the use of psychological time will help you both develop in a fairly balanced manner. I have enjoyed this evening's session. After some more material with our inner senses perhaps we shall take some time out to go into your various life readings, as I have let them go to get other material to you.
quotes.translation: 我希望你能沿着这些方向发展，但进步速度当然取决于你自己，且个人能力会因具体情况而异。这是意料之中的事。通常来说，运用心理时间将帮助你们以相当平衡的方式共同成长。我很享受今晚的课程。待我们继续探讨内在感官的更多资料后，或许会抽空处理你们各种生命解读的问题——毕竟我为了提供其他资料而暂时搁置了这些内容。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: A note here: Ruburt may try the psychological time experiments twenty minutes daily; and indeed yes, the time of the day should be uniform. I would suggest now that he seriously begin to schedule this with his daily activities. It is best that you be in the house with him, Joseph. And indeed, for your own edification your life in general will be much more comfortable within what I would call a short time; though to you this may be two years, before a noticeable change is apparent.
quotes.translation: 在此提醒：鲁柏可每日进行二十分钟的心理时间实验；确实，每日的时段应保持一致。约瑟，我建议他认真将此事纳入日常作息。你最好与他同处一室。事实上，就你自身的启迪而言，你的整体生活将在所谓"短时间"内变得更为舒适——尽管对你而言，在明显变化显现前，这可能需要两年时间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Nor does the evolution of either an idea or a species involve time. It merely involves time in your universe. You insist upon labeling as laws of absolutes what is actually your distorted and limited vision of concepts as they seem to appear to you. Using psychological time, sit in a quiet room; and I hope this is not impossible, when an idea comes to you, and I presume it will, do not play with it intellectually. You can dissect it to your heart's content after the experience.
quotes.translation: 无论是观念还是物种的演化，本身并不涉及时间。它仅在你们的宇宙中涉及时间。你们执意将自身对概念扭曲而有限的认知——即概念在你们面前呈现的表象——标榜为绝对法则。运用心理时间时，请静坐于安静房间；希望这并非难事。当某个念头浮现（我相信它必将出现），切勿以智性玩弄它。待体验结束后，你尽可随心所欲地剖析它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You will I am sure see the similarity now between this inner, alone sort of psychological time, experienced very often in waking hours, and the sense of time experienced in dreams. This is meant to show you but one more point of similarity between the waking and sleeping selves. In other words it is meant as another proof that they are indeed but one self, and that any divisions between them are artificial.
quotes.translation: 我相信你们此刻已能看出，这种常在清醒时刻体验的内在孤独心理时间，与梦境中的时间感何其相似。这旨在向你们揭示清醒自我与梦境自我的又一共通之处。换言之，这意在证明它们实为同一自我，任何人为的划分都是虚妄的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I want to make one note here, that again experience in the use of psychological time will bring you close to an understanding of the value climate of psychological reality, for obvious reasons. Psychological time indeed is a part of this climate as it appears in fairly uncamouflaged form in your own universe. You can get the feel of it.
quotes.translation: 此处需补充说明：运用心理时间的体验，将因显而易见的原因，使你们更接近理解心理实相的价值氛围。心理时间本就是这氛围的一部分——它以近乎未伪装的形式显现在你们的宇宙中。你们能够感知其本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Hypnosis is at best a poor tool. A light trance state, self induced, can yield excellent results in a subject who is trained along these lines. Later we will go into other experiments. As I have said, so-called space travel will be mainly divorced from vehicles, and the use of psychological time is the very first step in this direction.
quotes.translation: 催眠充其量只是拙劣的工具。经此训练的对象，通过自我诱导的浅层出神状态，可获得卓越成效。后续我们将探讨其他实验。如我所言，所谓的太空旅行终将脱离载具，而心理时间的运用正是迈向此方向的第一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your idea of keeping detailed records of psychological time experiments is an excellent one. There is at least a possibility that you and Ruburt, using your own individual inner senses, may at times perceive different aspects of a given situation, and that the individual perceptions will enable you to achieve a greater knowledge of a specific, or any specific, happening than either of you separately could achieve. This of course will take time and training.
quotes.translation: 你们详细记录心理时间实验的想法极佳。至少存在这种可能：你与鲁柏各自运用内在感官时，或许会感知到同一情境的不同面向，而个体感知的整合将使你们对特定事件（或任何事件）获得远超各自独力探索的认知。这当然需要时间与训练。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Action is not affected by time as you know it. Action also takes place within the spacious present. You may, however, only perceive parts of action in your time breakdown. Ideally, psychological time experiences will allow you to perceive action more clearly and directly. The ego attempts to control action by standing apart from it. Any such division is arbitrary, and in no way affects the nature of action itself. All that changes is your perception of it.
quotes.translation: 行动并不受你所知的时间影响。行动同样发生在广袤的当下。然而，你只能在时间分段中感知到行动的片段。理想情况下，心理时间体验将让你更清晰、更直接地感知行动。自我试图通过置身事外来控制行动。任何这样的划分都是武断的，绝不会影响行动本身的本质。唯一改变的是你对它的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ruburt may feel betwixt and between, as indeed at times he is, but only occasionally. We must have some experiments to progress. It seems that we should supplement our lectures, at least now and then. Also, if Ruburt is experimenting as he is with the trance state in psychological time experiments, it is a good idea that some of this experimentation be carried on by him under our excellent supervision; and after consideration I think that you will agree.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏可能会感到进退两难，事实上他有时确实如此，但只是偶尔。我们必须进行一些实验才能进步。看来我们应该补充我们的讲座，至少时不时地。此外，如果鲁柏像在心理时间实验中那样进行出神状态的实验，那么他在我们出色的监督下进行一些这样的实验是个好主意；经过考虑，我想你会同意的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When I come here to speak I focus my energy, but not toward this room as a destination, for in your terms this room does not exist to me. In your terms, this room does not even exist to you. You pretend to agree that it does; we meet in no place of space or time. The true meetings that take place here have nothing to do with the room or the people that you think you are. You know that you hallucinate the room, that you are as much in trance here as you ever are when you are in psychological time. I simply want you to realize that if this life is a trance, then you can turn the direction of your consciousness to perceive greater realities that presently exist. You can be aware of your own greater identity, even as I am. You sit within the miracle of yourselves and ask for signs. It is your inner eyes I would open.
quotes.translation: 当我来这里说话时，我集中我的能量，但不是以这个房间为目标，因为用你们的话说，这个房间对我来说并不存在。用你们的话说，这个房间甚至对你们也不存在。你们假装同意它存在；我们在没有空间或时间的地方相遇。这里发生的真正会面与房间或你们自以为是的那些人无关。你们知道你们在幻觉这个房间，你们在这里和在心理时间中一样处于出神状态。我只是想让你们意识到，如果这一生是一场出神，那么你们可以转变意识的方向，去感知当前存在的更大实相。你们可以意识到自己更大的身份，就像我一样。你们坐在自己的奇迹之中，却寻求迹象。我要打开的是你们的内在之眼。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The material in these last sessions will be basic for further discussions. We are going much deeper into the meaning of reality, and the aspects of reality. Our present procedure is working out very well, and it is enabling me to discuss matters that were too complicated for our earlier method. Before we close I want you to understand that your experiments in psychological time add to your mobility and subconscious manipulation within the electrical universe. And all psychic experience must have reality here, that is, within the electrical system. There is no psychic experience which does not have such electric reality. Your psychological experiments give you familiar ground there to walk upon, to travel on; grounds of reference and even of safety.
quotes.translation: 最后这几节课的材料将是进一步讨论的基础。我们将更深入地探讨实相的意义和实相的各面向。我们目前的程序进展得很好，它使我能够讨论那些对我们早期方法来说过于复杂的问题。在结束之前，我希望你们明白，你们在心理时间中的实验增加了你们在电性宇宙中的机动性和潜意识操控能力。所有心灵体验都必须在这里，即在电性系统内，具有实相。没有任何心灵体验不具有这样的电性实相。你们的心理实验为你们提供了在那里行走、旅行的熟悉地面；提供了参考点甚至安全的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: （I would like to note here that one night during the second week in December, possibly around the 11th or 12th, I awoke out of a sound sleep to become aware that both arms and hands were involved in my rather familiar sensation of enlargement and of elevation. The feeling of enlargement centers mainly on the tops of the limbs, as though they were swelling, and is not to be confused with the overall thrilling or tingling sensation I often refer to. I have now experienced both sensations many times. As far as I can consciously recall, this instances is the first I have experienced upon coming out of a sleep. I was lying upon my back at the time, and this is the position I use while trying psychological time.
quotes.translation: （我想在此说明，在十二月的第二周的一个晚上，可能是11日或12日左右，我从沉睡中醒来，意识到双臂和双手都卷入了我相当熟悉的膨胀和提升感中。膨胀感主要集中在肢体的顶端，仿佛它们在肿胀，不应与我常提到的整体震颤或刺痛感混淆。我现在已经多次体验过这两种感觉。就我有意识回忆而言，这次是我从睡眠中醒来后第一次体验到。当时我仰卧着，这也是我在尝试心理时间时使用的姿势。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now: When you properly understand how to use psychological time, then to some extent you can learn to alter the nature and focus of your consciousness. You can turn it in many directions. You can focus it in other ways, away from physical reality. This does not mean that you will be left high and dry here. It does mean that you will begin to explore the reality of yourselves, and of those other dimensions in which you have your existence.
quotes.translation: 现在：当你们正确理解如何使用心理时间时，那么在一定程度上你们可以学会改变你们意识的本质和焦点。你们可以将其转向许多方向。你们可以以其他方式聚焦它，远离物质实相。这并不意味着你们会在这里被晾在一边。这确实意味着你们将开始探索你们自己的实相，以及你们所存在的那些其他维度的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You may take a break or you may end the session. And don't say I haven't led you on a merry chase tonight, for when you reread the material you will see that I have. I cannot stress too strongly the benefits you will receive by using psychological time as I have told you. You know now what it is and how to use it to advantage. Not only will it help the physical and mental being on your plane, but it will enable you to meet the whole self.
quotes.translation: 你可以休息一下，也可以结束这节课。可别说我今晚没带你们兜个有趣的圈子，因为重读这些资料时你们自会明白。我无法过分强调按我教导的方式运用心理时间将带来的益处。你们现在已知其本质及如何善加利用。这不仅有助于你们层面上的身心健康，更能让你们遇见完整的自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This one, that one, is one of your favorites, and one of Ruburt's, and for that reason I myself do feel a warmth. I would suggest that Mark also exercise himself in the use of psychological time. He should progress fairly rapidly. His impulsive nature is actually somewhat more restrained in this life than it was in the previously past life. Nevertheless, one of the problems for the personality is still the need for a more disciplined ego.
quotes.translation: 这位、那位，都是你们钟爱的，也是鲁柏钟爱的，正因如此，我确实感到一份暖意。我建议马克也练习运用心理时间。他应该能进展得相当迅速。他冲动的本性在此生比前世其实更受约束。不过，人格面临的问题之一仍是需要更具纪律性的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your scientists' idea of an expanding universe is so dependent upon your own limited theories that it becomes very difficult to make the matter plain. Again I entreat you to practice with the use of psychological time, for here the inner senses are given the greatest freedom from camouflage. And experiencing the resulting inner expansion, you will perhaps come somewhat closer to the ideas involved in our real expanding universe.
quotes.translation: 你们科学家关于宇宙膨胀的观念过于依赖自身有限的理论，以致难以阐明真相。我再次恳请你们练习运用心理时间，因为内在感官在此能最大程度摆脱伪装。当体验到由此产生的内在扩张时，你们或许会更接近我们真实膨胀宇宙所涉及的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The span of a whole man's lifetime is no more than a moment point. The ego is the portion of you equipped to explore and experience this moment point in depth. （Smile.） Value fulfillment demands this slowing down of perception. This is most difficult to explain. Consider using psychological time. You have experiences within a few physical moments of physical time, experiences that are entirely independent of your time structure.
quotes.translation: 整个人生的跨度不过是一个瞬间点。自我是你被赋予用来深入探索和体验这个瞬间点的部分。（微笑）价值完成需要这种感知的放缓。这极难解释。请考虑运用心理时间。你们能在物理时间的几个片刻内获得完全独立于时间结构的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I have wanted to cover this because I can prove the existence of this dream world to you, and its continuity, always within the spacious present. You must understand psychological reality, psychological time, psychological experience, and the dream existence before you can learn to utilize many abilities, since in all the mentioned aspects, you use your abilities, that is your inner senses, on a subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 我一直想探讨这点，因为我能向你们证明这个梦境世界的存在及其连续性——它始终存在于广袤的当下。你们必须先理解心理实相、心理时间、心理体验以及梦境存在，才能学会运用许多能力，因为在所有提及的方面，你们都在潜意识层面运用着内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Also, your actions now can affect the future personality as well as the past one. You must try to stretch your imagination and feel these realities, because the intellect alone cannot comprehend them. Psychological time is your best method for perceiving these actualities.
quotes.translation: 此外，你们现在的行为既能影响未来的人格，也能影响过去的人格。必须努力伸展想象力去感受这些实相，因为单凭智力无法理解它们。心理时间是你们感知这些实相的最佳方法。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I wanted to say a little more about duration, as far as communication from the inner senses are concerned. As I said, duration can be experienced in relation to psychological time and within its framework. The important thing here, and I'm afraid the difficult thing for you here, is the relaxation of the mind from clock time. And this is a freedom which you can and should allow yourself in such instances.
quotes.translation: 关于内在感官所感知的"绵延"，我想再多说几句。如我所言，绵延可以在心理时间的框架内被体验。这里的关键——恐怕对你们而言也是难点——在于让心智从钟表时间中松脱。这种自由，你们在类似情境中应当且能够允许自己获得。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I will not go deeply into this, but there is an interruption of vibrations there, and a crosscurrent. It is too late to discuss this fully. Psychological time for both of you should be maintained, for psychic education and for the physical benefits achieved through momentary release from physical time. For Ruburt, salt is beneficial during some periods of the month, and not beneficial at other times.
quotes.translation: 我不会深入探讨这点，但此处存在振动的中断与交叉流。现在详述已为时过晚。你们二人都应保持心理时间的练习，这既是为了灵性教育，也是通过短暂脱离物理时间而获得的身体益处。对鲁柏而言，盐分在每月某些时段有益，其他时段则无益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is formed equally by those experiences which are purely subjective, and which exist only within the psychological time framework. The subjective experiences therefore result in definite changes within the physical body framework. These changes are not caused because of a physical event, but because of an event occurring within a dream condition which has no reality in your physical universe.
quotes.translation: 它同样由纯粹主观的体验所构成——这些体验仅存在于心理时间框架内。因此主观体验会在物理身体框架中引发明确改变。这些改变并非源于物理事件，而是源于梦境状态中发生的事件——该事件在你们的物质宇宙中并无真实性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Nor have I forgotten any of the psychological time incidences. These will all be covered in a particular sequence of particular material devoted to them in a chunk, so to speak. Nor could I have even begun this explanation of the relationship and growth of the physical universe, the universe of negative matter, and the dream universe at a much earlier date. The preparations had to be laid.
quotes.translation: 我并未遗忘任何心理时间事件。这些都将以特定材料序列集中呈现——姑且称之为"整块"论述。我甚至无法更早开始解释物理宇宙（负物质宇宙）与梦境宇宙的关系与演化。准备工作必须先行完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Too-conscious an attempt will not help, but this material should help. The physical organism does indeed require sleep, but only the physical organism with its brain. The mind is continually in vigilance. Nevertheless when you are more proficient you will, with the aid of automatic use of psychological time, be able to operate much more effectively, and be upheld by energy without strain.
quotes.translation: 过于刻意的尝试无济于事，但这篇材料应有助益。物理有机体确实需要睡眠，但仅限其大脑部分。心智始终处于警觉状态。不过当你们更熟练时，借助心理时间的自动运用，将能更高效运作，并在无压力的能量支撑下保持活力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is no four o'clock in the afternoon or nine o'clock in the evening in my environment. By this I mean that I am not restricted to a time sequence. There is nothing preventing me from experiencing such sequences if I choose. We experience time, or what you would call its equivalent nature, in terms of intensities of experience -- a psychological time with its own peaks and valleys.
quotes.translation: 在我的环境中，不存在下午四时或晚间九时。这意味着我不受时间序列的限制。若我选择，也完全可以体验这类序列。我们体验时间（或你们所谓的时间本质）的方式，是依据体验的强度——一种拥有自身峰谷的心理时间。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You will discover this by experiencing the idea directly, and you can best achieve some approximation of accomplishment by using psychological time. Your idea of experiencing a concept is doubtlessly to follow it through from beginning to end. Sweet tootsies, there is no beginning or end, and this idea of yours is the result of a complete and utter concentration upon camouflage time.
quotes.translation: 你将通过直接体验这个理念来发现它，而使用心理时间是你最能接近达成目标的方法。你对体验一个概念的想法无疑是将其从头到尾贯彻到底。亲爱的宝贝，根本没有开始或结束，你这种想法完全是专注于伪装时间的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All this involved an idea of, and I hesitate to say advancement, but an idea of change along certain lines. We have spoken of mental genes. These are more or less psychic blueprints for physical matter, and in these mental genes existed the pattern for your human type of self-consciousness. It did not appear constructed, that is in constructed form, for a long period of physical time however, and we have discussed psychological time as being part of what I will call for now an inner time sense.
quotes.translation: 这一切涉及一个关于——我犹豫是否要说进步——但确实是在某些方向上的改变理念。我们曾讨论过心灵基因。这些或多或少是物质实相的心灵蓝图，在这些心灵基因中存在着你们人类类型自我意识的模式。然而，它并非在漫长的物理时间中以构建的形式出现，我们曾将心理时间讨论为我暂且称为内在时间感的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: What you call negative suggestions represent discordant actions. Unless the main reasons are discovered, the distortive actions will keep reoccurring. In many cases quite a simple exercise will almost immediately begin to make an improvement. With these exercises you are familiar, for in your psychological time the self is momentarily in connection with its more extensive portions.
quotes.translation: 你所谓的负面暗示代表不和谐的行动。除非找出主要原因，否则扭曲的行动会不断重复。在许多情况下，一个相当简单的练习几乎能立即开始带来改善。这些练习你都很熟悉，因为在你的心理时间里，自我会暂时与它更广阔的部分连接。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your own experiments in psychological time have allowed you, to some extent, to experience within yourselves such unimpeded action. You know now that the ego, because of its nature, attempts to set itself aside from action. It obviously cannot do so. The ego, being part of action, nevertheless affects the nature of action as seen in the various manifestations of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 你自己在心理时间中的实验，已在某种程度上让你在内在体验到这种无阻碍的行动。你现在知道，自我因其本性试图将自己与行动分离。它显然无法做到这一点。作为行动一部分的自我，却影响着在整体自我各种显现中所见的行动本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is his only hope of peace of mind and emotional stability. It would be advantageous for him, just when he begins the practice of psychological time, to suggest to himself that the work of the day is of primary importance. Certain arbitrary dates can be selected, any dates, for necessary letters to editors; and these letters should be written as automatically as possible.
quotes.translation: 这是他获得内心平静与情绪稳定的唯一希望。当他刚开始练习心理时间时，对自己暗示当天的工作至关重要会很有益处。可以选定某些任意日期——任何日期——来写必要的编辑信件；这些信件应尽可能自动地书写。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The semitrance state does not allow a clear awareness in either world. It is passed through very quickly as a rule, both on the way into a trance and on the way out of one. It is of course a part of both realities. This goes without saying. It is true that there is much this evening that could be added to our previous discussions, but Ruburt, particularly after last nights session, should rest. And I would also suggest that he forget his psychological time experiments until next Monday.
quotes.translation: 半出神状态不允许在两个世界中都有清晰的觉知。通常，无论是进入出神状态还是离开出神状态，都会很快经过这个阶段。它当然是两种实相的一部分。这自不待言。今晚确实有很多内容可以补充我们之前的讨论，但鲁柏，特别是在昨晚的课之后，应该休息。我也建议他暂时忘记心理时间实验，直到下周一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is one thing to recognize that your particular camouflage patterns are part of reality and another to realize that there is a reality that is independent of your camouflage patterns. One of my purposes is to enable you not only to recognize but experience this independent reality, and again the use of psychological time in a correct manner will be an invaluable aid.
quotes.translation: 认识到你特定的伪装模式只是实相的一部分，与意识到存在独立于你伪装模式的实相，这是两回事。我的目的之一，不仅是让你认识到这个独立实相，更要让你亲身体验它。而正确运用心理时间，将再次成为无价的助力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are doing so now. Ruburt is doing so now. Your lack of success lately with psychological time has been to a large measure caused by too great a conscious concentration upon the task. An emotional acceptance, distasteful as this may seem to Ruburt, is the answer here, and again a sensual immersion in the spacious present and in nature will refresh you here.
quotes.translation: 你现在正在这样做。鲁柏此刻也在这样做。你近来在心理时间练习上缺乏成效，很大程度上是因为意识过度聚焦于任务本身。情感上的接纳——尽管这对鲁柏而言可能令人不悦——才是关键所在。再次强调，沉浸于广阔的当下与自然之中，将在此处为你带来焕然一新的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This value, or this particular extension of self to include other self experience, is one of the attributes that can be expected through the use of psychological time. It is an attribute that is independent of and free from your physical as well as clock time. You should remember the difference between physical time and clock time--I have given them to you.
quotes.translation: 这种价值，或者说这种将自我延伸以包含其他自我体验的特定扩展，正是通过运用心理时间可以预期的特质之一。这是一种独立于物理时间与钟表时间、不受其束缚的特质。你应当牢记物理时间与钟表时间的区别——这些概念我已向你阐明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Before I answer the question that you voiced during break, Joseph, let me continue first along the lines of our discussion. Again, the dream world, which is a very vivid one and a valid one, does not take up any space at all. It is also free to a very large degree of your physical time, but it does exist in the climate or environment of psychological time.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，在我回答你休息时提出的问题之前，请容我先顺着我们讨论的脉络继续。再次强调，梦境世界——那个极为生动且真实的世界——完全不占据任何空间。它在很大程度上也摆脱了物理时间的束缚，但它确实存在于心理时间的氛围或环境之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The state into which Ruburt fell as a rule allows no such focus in either reality, but a suspension. It is necessary only as a transition. I will again suggest that for the present psychological time experiments be carried on once a day. There is no reason to give further time to it, in the evening, at this time. This is aimed at Ruburt. We want contrast.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏通常陷入的那种状态，不允许在任一实相中产生这样的聚焦，而是处于一种悬置状态。这种状态仅作为过渡阶段而存在。我再次建议，现阶段心理时间实验应每日进行一次。目前无需在晚间投入更多时间。这番话是针对鲁柏的。我们需要对比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The practice of psychological time will allow you to reach these portions of the self. The ego is not artificially disorganized by such practice. It is simply, for the moment, bypassed. The experience gained does become a part of the physical structure, but there is no massive disorganization of perception, since the ego agrees to step aside momentarily.
quotes.translation: 心理时间的练习将让你触及自我的这些部分。自我并不会因这种练习而被人为地瓦解。它只是暂时被绕过了。所获得的经验确实会成为物质结构的一部分，但不会造成感知的大规模混乱，因为自我同意暂时退居一旁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I am pleased to find you both in a fairly peaceful state. Your experiences with psychological time are also of great benefit, in allowing you freedom from everyday pressures, and freedom into a wider perspective.
quotes.translation: 很高兴发现你们两人都处于相当平静的状态。你们对心理时间的体验也大有裨益，能让你们从日常压力中解脱，获得更广阔的视野。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I believe that it will. Confidence should increase with each session. I have no control over exterior circumstances that affect you, however. Ruburt naturally can learn and is learning to control his responses to such conditions, and incidentally this week he has made a few strides as far as the quiet times he has spent in using psychological time.
quotes.translation: 我相信会的。每次课程后信心都应有所增长。不过，我无法控制影响你们的外在环境。鲁柏自然能够且正在学习控制他对这些状况的反应，顺便提一句，本周他在运用心理时间的静心时段里已取得了一些进展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Study and practice with psychological time will show you the validity and strength of that inner self, so that you will clearly see that it is not completely bound to the so-called objective universe by any means. Matter is not an imprisoning form. It is a means by which consciousness expresses itself within the limits of the physical field.
quotes.translation: 对心理时间的研究与实践将向你们展示内在自我的真实性与力量，使你们清楚看到它绝非完全受制于所谓的客观宇宙。物质并非禁锢的形式，而是意识在物质场域限制内表达自身的方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When you grow tired or exhausted, one of the reasons for this is your inability to use even the simple psychological time to your own advantage. Remember this. I wish you good luck with your new thingamajig. If it is going to record my voice, then I wish it luck. Perhaps I shall play tricks on it. Perhaps I shall play tricks on you.
quotes.translation: 当你们感到疲惫或力竭时，原因之一便是未能善用甚至最简单的心理时间。请记住这点。祝你们的新玩意儿好运。若它要录制我的声音，那我便祝它好运。或许我会捉弄它，或许我会捉弄你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is somewhat similar to your own emotional feelings when time seems speeded up or slowed down, but it is vastly different in important ways. Our psychological time could be compared in terms of environment to the walls of a room, but in our case the walls would be constantly changing in color, size, height, depth and width.
quotes.translation: 这类似于你们情绪波动时时间仿佛加速或减缓的感受，但在关键层面存在巨大差异。我们的心理时间若以环境类比，可比作房间的墙壁，但在我们的情况中，这些墙壁会不断变换颜色、大小、高度、深度与宽度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you will remember this, inner data will come through much more easily, and you will be able to control it. It is never of itself overpowering. There are abilities in which you can train yourself, in both recognition of data when it occurs, utilization, and control. This also implies to some degree utilization as far as duration is concerned. That is, within the framework of psychological time you can lengthen such experiences.
quotes.translation: 若你们能记住这点，内在信息将更易涌入，你们也能掌控它。它本身从不会令人难以承受。你们可以训练自己识别、运用并掌控这些信息的能力。就持续时间而言，这也在某种程度上意味着运用——即在心理时间的框架内，你们可以延长此类体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I did indeed attempt to tell him to use caution, immediately after his last psychological time experiment. It is, of course, necessary that you learn through direct experience; and my warning you against various uncomfortable effects would not mean nearly as much if you did not, Ruburt, experience a few of them.
quotes.translation: 我确实试图在他上次心理时间实验后立即告诫他要谨慎。当然，你必须通过直接体验来学习；如果你没有亲身经历一些不适效应，鲁柏，我的警告对你而言意义将大打折扣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In psychological time therefore it is at least possible that you can have some experience with other methods when you close off habitual methods of perception. The ego is firmly attached to the use of the physical senses, however. In the dream state there can also be other methods at least slightly experienced
quotes.translation: 因此，在心理时间中，当你关闭惯常的感知方式时，至少有可能体验到其他方法。然而，自我强烈依附于物质感官的使用。在梦境状态中，其他方法也至少能被轻微体验到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Time is one of your most obvious camouflages, and the study of time will lead you in a fairly direct manner from the camouflaged physical self to the inner self, which you ignore. Even now your psychologists speak of the difference between physical time, by which you set your clocks, and psychological time.
quotes.translation: 时间是你最明显的伪装之一，对时间的研究将引导你以相当直接的方式，从被伪装的物质自我走向被你忽视的内在自我。如今，你们的心理学家已在谈论物质时间（你们据此设定时钟）与心理时间之间的差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A complete change from intense focus outward to intense focus inward is most beneficial, but this does not mean that every few minutes found available be spent in psychological time experiments. Brisk walks should be a daily part of Ruburt's schedule in any case, and walking also refreshes the inner self.
quotes.translation: 从强烈向外聚焦到强烈向内聚焦的彻底转变最为有益，但这并不意味着要将每几分钟的空闲时间都用于心理时间实验。无论如何，快走应成为鲁柏日常行程的一部分，散步也能让内在自我焕然一新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You are discovering for yourself that basically there is no past, present and future, through your own experiments with psychological time, and you will also experience directly other material sometime before I have given it to you.
quotes.translation: 通过你们自己的心理时间实验，你们正在自行发现：本质上并无过去、现在与未来之分。在我尚未将某些材料传授给你们之前，你们也将直接体验到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I do not want to go into other inner sense material this evening as it is too late to begin on the fourth inner sense. Try and use psychological time as I have told you. This is extremely valuable, for it is the channel through which all other inner data must come at your particular stage.
quotes.translation: 今晚我不想深入探讨其他内在感官材料，因为开始讲解第四种内在感官已为时过晚。请尝试按我告诉你们的方式运用心理时间。这极为珍贵，因为在你们当前阶段，它是所有内在资料必须通过的通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I will now suggest a brief break before we deal with our friends. And incidentally, Ruburt's experience in psychological time was quite legitimate.
quotes.translation: 我先建议稍作休息，再处理我们朋友的事。顺便提一句，鲁柏在心理时间中的体验是完全正当的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The back room is the best for sleeping. However it is also the best for your working purposes, Joseph. The small room will do as a sleeping room, but the head of the bed should be at the north. And in the use of psychological time exercises you would do well if your head was at the north.
quotes.translation: 后面的房间最适合睡觉。不过约瑟，它也同样最适合你工作。小房间可以当卧室，但床头应朝北。在进行心理时间练习时，若你的头朝北会更好。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Ruburt may now, if he wishes, work on his psychological time in the morning. I wanted that particular routine broken up for a while, but now if it is more convenient he may return to his old schedule; that is, that same time of day, but twenty minutes should still be the limit.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏现在若愿意，可以在早上进行心理时间练习。我原本想暂时打破那个固定作息，但现在若更方便，他可以恢复原来的时间安排——即保持每日同一时段，但二十分钟仍应是上限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He must avoid a do-or-die attitude. He does best when he allows his mind to wander, and not when he hems it in. In his psychological time experiments lately, he has concentrated with his will, though he did not realize he was doing so. Again, this leads to a constriction.
quotes.translation: 他必须避免孤注一掷的态度。当他放任思绪漫游时效果最佳，而非刻意约束它。最近他在心理时间实验中，虽未察觉，却一直在用意志力强行集中。这再次导致了紧缩。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The use of psychological time will make the experience of death much less frightening. You will already have learned to recognize the spacious present for what it is, and the conscious ego will not be so bewildered and confused by the sudden perception that is involved.
quotes.translation: 运用心理时间将使死亡体验不再那么可怕。你们将学会认出"广袤当下"的本质，有意识的自我也不会因突然的感知而如此困惑迷惘。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You have each your own characteristic ways of advancement. You will discover, Joseph, that your ability to receive so-called telepathic data is showing itself in psychological time experiments and dreams, as well as in spontaneous flashes during regular consciousness.
quotes.translation: 你们各有独特的进步方式。约瑟，你会发现，你接收所谓心电感应数据的能力，正通过心理时间实验、梦境，以及日常意识中的自发闪现展现出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now this is what you attempt when you experiment with psychological time, when your communication comes through the inner rather than the outer senses. And all living consciousness initially enter your plane of awareness by route of such a mental enclosure.
quotes.translation: 这正是你在进行心理时间实验时所尝试的，当你的沟通通过内在而非外在感官进行时。所有活生生的意识最初都是经由这样的心灵围场进入你的觉知层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Psychological time indeed involves you in the initial venturing. It is like an outer rim. This Quality-depth is our only true perspective. Again, no intervals are involved. I find difficulty in choosing words evocative for my meaning.
quotes.translation: 心理时间确实让你参与最初的探索。它就像一个外缘。这种品质深度是我们唯一真正的视角。再次强调，其中不涉及任何间隔。我很难找到能唤起我本意的词汇。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Yes, although I want you to develop your own abilities. Ruburt has been trying too hard lately with psychological time, and trying to make his subconscious function and focus, in the same manner that the conscious mind does.
quotes.translation: 是的，虽然我希望你发展自己的能力。鲁柏最近在心理时间上过于努力，试图让他的潜意识像显意识那样运作和聚焦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （Also notice that on page 116, I mentioned that I have received many human images during psychological time experiments, and that often the people I perceive appear to be talking to me, but soundlessly.）
quotes.translation: （也请注意第116页，我提到在心理时间实验中接收到许多人类影像，而且我感知到的人常常似乎在对我说话，但无声无息。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Psychological time so-called belongs to the inner self, that is to the mind. It is however a connective, a portion of one of the inner senses, which we will call for convenience the second inner sense.
quotes.translation: 所谓心理时间属于内在自我，即属于心智。然而它是一个连接物，是内在感官的一部分，为方便起见我们称之为第二内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now: There are many words for psychological time. I do not mean my method of meditation alone. I do mean subjective activity on your part, and exploration. Do you follow me? I am glad!
quotes.translation: 现在：心理时间有许多名称。我指的不只是我的冥想方法。我指的是你自身的主观活动与探索。你明白我的意思吗？我很高兴！
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He is doing very well in our sessions. However in his psychological time experiments he is trying too hard. This leads to a constriction. We want an expansion.
quotes.translation: 他在我们的课程中表现良好。然而在心理时间实验中，他过于用力，这导致了紧缩。我们需要的是扩张。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As I mentioned, your psychological time experiences will also help you to investigate the nature of time and space to some degree.
quotes.translation: 如我所提，你的心理时间体验也将有助于你在某种程度上探究时间与空间的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json
